title: Tokyo Moulding
shortDescription: Transform your plain walls with premium Tokyo Moulding. A stylish, ready-to-paint, and waterproof wall panelling solution for luxury homes and offices in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Goals Floors brings you the elegant Tokyo Moulding series to completely transform your interior spaces in Gurugram, Delhi, and Noida. If you want to give your plain walls a luxurious, architectural look without heavy wood-work, this is the perfect solution.

Made from high-density, waterproof materials, these wall mouldings look like premium wood but are much better. Unlike normal wood, they will never warp, bend, or get damaged by water and extreme weather. They come pre-primed, which means you can easily paint them in any color to perfectly match your room's theme.

Whether you are designing a beautiful living room TV backdrop, a luxury bedroom wall, or a modern office reception, Tokyo Moulding gives a flawless, premium finish. It is highly durable, termite-proof, and super easy to install.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Termite Proof
features.description: Made from premium materials that never absorb water. It is completely safe from wall dampness (seelan) and termites (deemak).

features.title: Ready to Paint
features.description: Comes pre-primed with a smooth white finish. Just paste it and apply your favorite wall paint to match your interior theme perfectly.

features.title: Easy & Fast Installation
features.description: No heavy carpentry or drilling required. It can be easily cut to your required size and pasted directly on the wall using strong adhesive.

features.title: Seamless & Nail-Free Finish
features.description: Designed to join smoothly without leaving any ugly nail marks or visible joints, giving your walls a very clean and premium look.

features.title: Highly Durable & Fire Safe
features.description: Built tough for a long-lasting life. It also has fire-retardant properties, making it completely safe for homes and commercial offices.

architectHeading: WHY ARCHITECTS CHOOSE OUR TOKYO MOULDING
architectSubheading: Tokyo Moulding Comes With Japanese Technologies - EASY TO FIX, READY TO PAINT
installation: Installation is incredibly fast and clean. No heavy machinery or drilling is required. The mouldings are easily cut to your required size and pasted directly onto any flat wall or plywood using strong PU adhesive (like 3M). It gives a beautiful, seamless finish with no visible nail marks.
maintenance: It is completely hassle-free. You can easily wipe off dust with a dry or slightly damp microfiber cloth. Because it is waterproof, you don't have to worry about moisture damage. Just avoid using harsh chemicals or wire scrubbers to keep the paint safe.

faqs.question: What is Tokyo Moulding used for?
faqs.answer: It is a premium architectural decor item used to create beautiful frames, panels, and borders on plain walls, giving them a luxurious, French-style or modern look.

faqs.question: Is it made of real wood?
faqs.answer: No, it is made from high-density, advanced polymer materials. It looks and feels premium like wood but is much better because it is 100% waterproof and termite-proof.

faqs.question: Do I need to paint it after installation?
faqs.answer: Yes, the mouldings come pre-primed in white. After pasting them on the wall, you can paint them along with your wall in any color you like so they blend perfectly.

faqs.question: Can I install it on a damp wall (seelan wali deewar)?
faqs.answer: The moulding itself is 100% waterproof. However, for the glue to stick strongly to the wall, we recommend fixing any severe water leakage or peeling paint before pasting it.

faqs.question: How is it fixed to the wall? Will there be nail marks?
faqs.answer: It is fixed using a strong, nail-free PU adhesive (glue). This ensures a very clean, seamless look with no ugly nail marks or holes visible on your beautiful walls.

faqs.question: Will it get damaged by termites (deemak)?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Since it does not contain natural wood fibers that attract insects, it is completely termite-proof and very safe for Indian homes.

faqs.question: Can I use it to make a TV unit backdrop?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! It is highly popular for creating elegant frames and stylish backdrops behind TV units and beds in luxury apartments and villas.

faqs.question: Is it safe for commercial offices and hotels?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is manufactured with fire-retardant properties, making it completely safe and compliant for use in corporate offices, hotels, and public spaces.

faqs.question: How do I clean it?
faqs.answer: Cleaning is very easy. Simply use a feather duster or a soft damp cloth to wipe away any dust. Do not use acid or hard wire scrubbers.

faqs.question: Do you supply this in bulk for projects in Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a major B2B supplier. We provide ready stock, fast delivery, and special project pricing for architects, builders, and interior designers across Gurugram, Delhi, and Noida.

installationSteps.title: Prepare the Surface
installationSteps.description: Make sure the wall is ready:
points: Clean the wall to remove any dust or oil.
Ensure the wall is completely dry.
The surface should be flat and smooth.
installationSteps.tip: A smooth wall gives the glue a strong grip and ensures a premium finish.

installationSteps.title: Measure & Cut
points: Cut the panels straight at a 90° angle using a saw.
Ensure the cut edges are clean and accurate.

installationSteps.title: Apply Nail-Free Glue
points: Apply the glue in zig-zag or dot patterns on the back of the moulding.
Keep the glue slightly away from the edges.
installationSteps.tip: Do not apply too much glue near the edges, or it will squeeze out and ruin the finish.

installationSteps.title: Fix & Finish
points: Press the moulding firmly against the wall.
Hold it in place for 10-20 seconds.
Check with a leveler to ensure it is perfectly straight.
Wipe away any extra glue immediately with a damp cloth.
